nodes.name: PROJECT_GUIDE.md
nodes.summary: Onboarding guide for the Lok Sabha research pipeline: current capabilities, pipeline commands, key output CSVs, column glossary, and recommended next milestones toward state-first analysis.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Top-level project README describing the Indian Election Model architecture, install steps, full pipeline run order, demographic warehouse workflow, visual explorer setup, and planned analyses.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Demographic data warehouse guide covering catalog-first Census/NFHS ingestion, folder layout, cleaner commands, geography caveats, and priority next data files.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: DHS/NFHS microdata pipeline documentation with privacy rules, CLI commands, output file catalog, and visualizer integration for anonymized cluster maps.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Python dependency manifest for the research pipeline: pandas/numpy data stack, Excel readers, pyarrow parquet, scikit-learn, Jupyter, pyreadstat for DHS Stata files, and pyshp for geospatial extraction.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty root package marker enabling `python -m src.*` module execution.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty analysis subpackage initializer.

nodes.name: build_constituency_volatality.py
nodes.summary: Builds constituency_volatility_2019_2024.csv by merging winner comparison, party swing aggregates, and 2024 constituency features into a composite volatility score.

nodes.name: load_data
nodes.summary: Reads winner comparison CSV, party swings CSV, and 2024 constituency features parquet.

nodes.name: build_party_swing_features
nodes.summary: Aggregates per-constituency max/min/average absolute party swings and swing range.

nodes.name: build_volatility_table
nodes.summary: Merges comparison, swing, and feature columns then computes flip, margin, fragmentation, and composite volatility scores.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point writing constituency_volatility_2019_2024.csv and printing top volatile seats.

nodes.name: build_state_election_demographic_analysis.py
nodes.summary: State-level bridge script joining Lok Sabha 2019/2024 outcomes, volatility, party swings, and Census demographics with explicit geography match status tags.

nodes.name: normalise_state_name
nodes.summary: Normalises state names for Census/ECI key matching with uppercase and ampersand handling.

nodes.name: load_inputs
nodes.summary: Loads winner comparison, volatility, party swings, alliance map, and state demographics master CSVs.

nodes.name: weighted_average
nodes.summary: Population-weighted mean helper for composite demographic rows.

nodes.name: build_demographic_lookup
nodes.summary: Builds state-keyed demographic lookup with composite UT rows and legacy 2011 geography aliases.

nodes.name: add_alliance_columns
nodes.summary: Joins 2019/2024 alliance labels onto winner rows and flags alliance flips.

nodes.name: most_common
nodes.summary: Returns the modal value from a pandas Series for leading party/alliance aggregation.

nodes.name: build_state_outcomes
nodes.summary: Aggregates seat flips, BJP/INC seat changes, volatility metrics, and flip rates per state.

nodes.name: build_state_party_swings
nodes.summary: Builds per-state party swing table with seat counts and 2024 alliance labels.

nodes.name: add_key_party_swing_columns
nodes.summary: Pivots BJP and INC average swings onto the state outcomes table.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point writing state_election_demographic_analysis.csv and state_party_swing_analysis.csv.

nodes.name: compare_2019_2024.py
nodes.summary: Cross-year historical comparison: reconciles renamed constituencies via alias map, builds winner comparison, party swing tables, and unmatched constituency audit.

nodes.name: load_results
nodes.summary: Loads 2019 and 2024 results_table parquet files from data/database.

nodes.name: add_comparison_key
nodes.summary: Applies CONSTITUENCY_ID_ALIASES map to align cross-year constituency_id keys.

nodes.name: build_unmatched_constituencies
nodes.summary: Identifies winner rows with no cross-year constituency match for audit output.

nodes.name: build_winner_comparison
nodes.summary: Inner-joins 2019 and 2024 winners on reconciled constituency_id and flags seat_flipped.

nodes.name: build_party_swing_table
nodes.summary: Outer-joins party vote shares by constituency/party and computes swing as 2024 minus 2019.

nodes.name: build_state_swing_summary
nodes.summary: Averages party swings by state and party_id for summary CSV.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI orchestrator saving winner comparison, party swings, state summary, and unmatched audit CSVs.

nodes.summary: Placeholder module for future constituency-level demographic allocation; not yet implemented.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: DHS/NFHS subpackage docstring marking the microdata aggregation pipeline namespace.

nodes.name: national_demographics.py
nodes.summary: Empty placeholder for national-level demographic aggregation.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty features subpackage initializer.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty simulation subpackage initializer.

nodes.name: election_simulator_v1.py
nodes.summary: Full scenario simulator v1: loads editable state/party swings, applies zero-sum renormalisation per constituency, and writes projections, flip reports, and battleground rankings.

nodes.name: load_state_party_swings
nodes.summary: Parses and validates scenario CSV into a (state, party_id) to swing lookup dict.

nodes.name: apply_zero_sum_swing
nodes.summary: Applies per-party swings within a constituency group and renormalises simulated vote shares to 100%.

nodes.name: load_data
nodes.summary: Loads 2024 results, alliance map, optional volatility table, and scenario swings.

nodes.name: add_alliances
nodes.summary: Joins BASE_YEAR alliance labels onto results rows.

nodes.name: simulate
nodes.summary: Group-applies zero-sum swing across all constituencies and extracts simulated winners.

nodes.name: build_actual_winners
nodes.summary: Extracts actual 2024 winner rows with renamed columns for flip comparison.

nodes.name: build_flip_report
nodes.summary: Merges actual and simulated winners and flags flipped seats.

nodes.name: build_national_projection
nodes.summary: Counts simulated seats by party and alliance nationally.

nodes.name: build_state_projection
nodes.summary: Counts simulated seats by state and party.

nodes.name: build_battlegrounds
nodes.summary: Enriches flip report with volatility features and sorts battleground seats.

nodes.name: save_outputs
nodes.summary: Writes full simulation CSVs including results, winners, projections, and battlegrounds.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point running the full v1 scenario simulator and printing projection summary.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty utils subpackage initializer.

nodes.name: build_visualizer_data.py
nodes.summary: ETL script assembling a relational JSON bundle (states, districts, party swings, constituencies) for the static visualizer with grid positions and field catalog metadata.

nodes.name: clean_json_value
nodes.summary: Sanitises pandas/numpy values for JSON serialisation (NaN to null).

nodes.name: records
nodes.summary: Converts a DataFrame to a list of JSON-safe dict records.

nodes.name: name_key
nodes.summary: Normalises geographic names to uppercase keys with alias mapping.

nodes.name: canonical_state_for_district
nodes.summary: Maps 2011 district rows to 2024 election states including Telangana and Ladakh splits.

nodes.name: add_state_grid
nodes.summary: Adds cartogram grid_row/grid_col coordinates from STATE_GRID_POSITIONS lookup.

nodes.name: build_field_catalog
nodes.summary: Builds visualizer field metadata with labels, groups, and coverage counts.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point writing visualizer/data/election_demographics_bundle.json.

nodes.name: app.js
nodes.summary: Browser-side election and demographics explorer: state grid cartogram, metric choropleth coloring, district/party/constituency drilldown tables, and optional DHS cluster scatter overlay.

nodes.name: colorFor
nodes.summary: Maps a numeric metric value to an RGB choropleth color on a three-stop green ramp.

nodes.name: initControls
nodes.summary: Populates metric/state/sort controls and wires UI event listeners.

nodes.name: renderLegend
nodes.summary: Renders the selected metric legend with min/max formatted values.

nodes.name: renderMap
nodes.summary: Renders state grid tiles and sortable state summary table colored by selected metric.

nodes.name: renderStateSummary
nodes.summary: Displays metric cards and election/demography signal rows for the selected state.

nodes.name: renderCoverage
nodes.summary: Shows field availability bars from the bundle field catalog.

nodes.name: renderTable
nodes.summary: Generic HTML table renderer with formatted values and row limits.

nodes.name: renderDistricts
nodes.summary: Filters and sorts district demographics for the selected state.

nodes.name: renderParties
nodes.summary: Shows state party swing table filtered by minimum seat threshold.

nodes.name: renderConstituencies
nodes.summary: Lists constituencies with flip/close filters sorted by volatility score.

nodes.name: renderDhsMap
nodes.summary: Renders SVG scatter map of anonymized DHS cluster points with tooltips.

nodes.name: render
nodes.summary: Top-level render orchestrator refreshing all dashboard panels.

nodes.name: loadDhsClusters
nodes.summary: Fetches and parses the public DHS geospatial CSV layer.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Async bootstrap: loads JSON bundle, initializes controls, and renders the dashboard.
